items.name: Claude Opus 4.7 — GA
items.hook: New flagship. SWE-bench Verified ~87.6%, new xhigh effort level, 2,576px vision, same $15/$75 pricing. Ships across API, Bedrock, Vertex, Foundry.

items.name: Claude Code Routines (research preview)
items.hook: Scheduled, API-triggered, or GitHub-webhook-triggered Claude Code automations that run on Anthropic's cloud. Pro 5/day, Max 15/day, Team & Enterprise 25/day.

items.name: Claude Code Desktop — complete redesign
items.hook: Multi-session sidebar, drag-and-drop panes, integrated terminal, in-app file editor, rebuilt diff viewer for large changesets, expanded preview pane (HTML, PDF, local app servers).

items.name: /ultrareview — multi-agent cloud review
items.hook: Spins up parallel reviewer agents in an Anthropic cloud sandbox that independently reproduce bugs before surfacing them. Pro & Max get 3 free runs.

items.name: Claude Code v2.1.110 — /tui fullscreen + mobile push
items.hook: /tui fullscreen flicker-free rendering without restart. New push-notification tool lets Claude ping your phone when Remote Control + 'Push when Claude decides' are on. Ctrl+O toggles verbose transcript, /focus is now its own command.

items.name: Computer use lands in the Claude Code CLI
items.hook: Claude can open native apps, click through UIs, test its own changes, and fix what breaks — from the terminal. Enable via /mcp → computer-use.

items.name: Session /recap + 1-hour & forced 5-min prompt caching
items.hook: New /recap command rehydrates context when you return to a session. New 1-hour and forced 5-minute prompt-cache controls, plus Skill-tool access to built-in /init, /review, /security-review.

items.name: Monitor tool + Linux PID-namespace subprocess sandboxing
items.hook: New Monitor tool streams events from background scripts (each stdout line is a notification). Subprocesses gain PID-namespace isolation on Linux.

items.name: xhigh effort level + interactive /effort slider
items.hook: New 'extra high' reasoning tier between high and max for Opus 4.7. /effort with no args opens an arrow-key slider; xhigh is now the default in Claude Code.

items.name: Auto mode for Opus 4.7 (Max plan)
items.hook: Opus 4.7 now supports Auto mode on Max — fewer permission prompts during long agentic runs. Pair with channels and isolated workspaces.

items.name: Claude Design launch
items.hook: AI design tool for prototypes, decks, and marketing assets with direct handoff to Claude Code. Reads your codebase to build a custom design system. Figma stock closed −6.4% on news.

items.name: Claude Code source code leaks via npm source map
items.hook: @anthropic-ai/claude-code@2.1.88 shipped a 59.8 MB source map — ~512k lines of TypeScript, ~1,900 files, 44 hidden feature flags, the always-on KAIROS daemon, autoDream memory consolidation, and an 'undercover mode'. Mirror repo hit 84k★/82k forks.

items.name: npm axios supply-chain trojan hits Claude Code installers
items.hook: Between 00:21 and 03:29 UTC on Mar 31, malicious axios 1.14.1 / 0.30.4 containing a cross-platform RAT were pulled alongside Claude Code updates. Anthropic now recommends the Native Installer over npm.

items.name: "Gaslightus 4.7" — r/ClaudeCode Opus 4.7 backlash
items.hook: 1.7k-upvote thread catalogues Opus 4.7 inventing files, defending hallucinated tests across ten turns, and obsessively scanning benign PowerPoints for malware. Anthropic acknowledges usage limits hit faster than expected.

items.name: Caveman — "talk like caveman, use 75% less tokens"
items.hook: Prompt-engineered plugin strips articles, pleasantries, and restatements from Claude's output — keeps code blocks and technical terms. 10k-upvote Reddit post, HN front page, 20k+ GitHub stars.

items.name: /dev for Claude Code — Tech-Lead orchestrator
items.hook: Slash command turns Claude into a Tech Lead running parallel Worker agents in git worktrees. 6-phase workflow: PRD alignment → architecture → code → QA → review → iterate, with mandatory security audits before merge.

items.name: CC-BEEPER — floating macOS pager
items.hook: Native macOS companion for Claude Code: permissions, voice input, spoken recaps, hotkeys, four auto-accept modes. Product Hunt #6 with 220 upvotes on Apr 15.

items.name: Masko Code — desktop mascot that watches your agents
items.hook: Free, open-source mascot that sits on your desktop and reacts in real time to what your Claude Code agents are doing. macOS 14+, 100% local, MIT.

items.name: CCHub — Tauri desktop control panel
items.hook: Cross-platform desktop app (Tauri v2 + React + Rust) that unifies Claude Code / Codex / Gemini CLI — MCP marketplace, config profiles, skills & plugins browser, workflow templates, security audit.

items.name: Tech Digest skill — /digest from HN + Lobste.rs
items.hook: Zero-dependency Claude Code skill: type /digest and get a score-filtered, structured recap of the last 3 days from Hacker News Daily and Lobste.rs RSS/Atom feeds.

items.name: last30days — cross-source research skill
items.hook: Skill that researches any topic across Reddit, X, YouTube, HN, Polymarket, and the open web, then synthesizes a grounded month-in-review summary.

items.name: Cloudflare Code Mode MCP Server
items.hook: MCP server that lets agents drive 2,500+ API endpoints while shrinking the token footprint from ~1.17M to ~1k — a claimed 99.9% reduction via a code-execution execution model.

items.name: WordPress Playground MCP server
items.hook: One-command @wp-playground/mcp wires Claude Code or Gemini CLI to a browser-based WordPress Playground over WebSocket — read/write files, execute PHP, manage sites, navigate pages.

items.name: Azure MCP Server 2.0 — stable, self-hosted
items.hook: 2.0 adds remote, self-hosted deployment: Azure MCP can now run where your team ships, with OAuth 2.1 incremental scopes per the new MCP spec.

items.name: Tons of Skills + ccpi CLI marketplace
items.hook: Open-source marketplace — 423 plugins, 2,849 skills, 177 agents — with a CCPI CLI package manager (`pnpm add -g @intentsolutionsio/ccpi`) for batch installs. MIT-licensed, searchable web UI.
